name: LANDS' END, INC.
summary: PART I ITEM 1. B USINESS As used in this Annual Report on Form 10-K, references to the Company, Lands End, we, us, our and similar terms refer to Lands End, Inc. and its subsidiaries. Our fiscal year ends on the Friday preceding the Saturday closest to January 31.
